title: Argentina tatsienluensis
intro: Argentina tatsienluensis, also known as the Tibetan sage or Tibetan sagebrush, is a type of shrub native to the high-altitude regions of the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Tibetan medicine, Argentina tatsienluensis is often prepared as a decoction or tea, or made into a powder for use in capsules or tablets.
